description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a medium build, depicted in a standing pose. She wears a fitted, long-sleeve top with a high collar and contrasting trim, paired with high-waisted, form-fitting pants that feature asymmetrical paneling and a knee patch on one leg. Her footwear consists of athletic-style shoes, and she has no visible accessories or carried items. The character's hair is cut in a chin-length bob with a slight inward curve at the ends, and her facial features are simplified in a cartoon-like manner. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban context, suitable for city streets or parks. The surface finish is matte, with smooth, clean lines and no visible textures or fabric details.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in fitted, modern clothing and athletic shoes, standing upright with a chin-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, high-collared top, fitted pants with knee patch, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the inward curve of the bob haircut, and the asymmetrical knee patch on the right leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the fitted contour of the clothing, and the symmetrical stance of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, with the same bob hairstyle and the left leg's plain design.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top with high collar and form-fitting pants with knee patch, athletic style
